channel.title: RHispano on Mirai Data
channel.description: Recent content in RHispano on Mirai Data

item.title: II Congress & XIII Conference of R Users in Barcelona
item.description: This year we have returned to the II Congress and XIII Conference of the R Hispano Community, which were held in Barcelona and hosted by Pompeu Fabra University.

item.title: I Congress & XII Conference of R Users in Córdoba
item.description: On 23, 24 and 25 November, we had the opportunity to attend the annual meeting organised by the R Hispano Community, which this year was hosted by the University of Córdoba.
